headline: What's in the Offing for Ventas Stock This Earnings Season?
summary: VTR's Q1 earnings are expected to show solid revenue and FFO growth, driven by SHOP & OM&R portfolio strength despite weakness in triple-net leased properties.

headline: Alexandria to Post Q1 Earnings: What to Expect From the Stock?
summary: ARE is set to report Q1 results on April 27, with the consensus pointing to lower revenues and adjusted FFO as occupancy pressures weigh on performance.

raw.headline: Alexandria to Post Q1 Earnings: What to Expect From the Stock?

headline: Is Public Storage Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: PSA heads into Q1 earnings results with rising revenue forecasts and steady FFO growth, but same-store pressure and lowered estimates could temper expectations.

raw.headline: Is Public Storage Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?

headline: A Look At BXP (BXP) Valuation After New San Francisco Leasing Momentum
summary: BXP (BXP) has just secured more than 200,000 square feet of new leases at its 680 Folsom and 50 Hawthorne properties in San Francisco, pushing occupancy at these assets to high levels. See our latest analysis for BXP. These San Francisco lease wins come as BXP’s share price sits at US$58.91, with a 1-month share price return of 13.11% and a 3-year total shareholder return of 33.91%. This suggests improving short term momentum on top of longer term gains despite weaker recent quarters. If this...
